/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++   -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG   -L /home/jhj/libdwarf-bsd/b -Wl,--export-dynamic -DTARG_MIPS CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/driver.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/driver_util.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/iter.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/__/com/phase.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/__/com/clone_DST_utils.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/__/com/clone.cxx.o CMakeFiles/be-exec-mips.dir/__/__/common/com/dwarf_DST_producer.cxx.o  -o ../../../lib/mips/be -rdynamic -Wl,--whole-archive ../../../lib/mips/libbe.a ../../../lib/mips/libcg.a ../../../lib/mips/libwopt.a ../../../lib/librtkutils.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive ../../../lib/libelfutil.a ../../../lib/libelf.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a -ldwarf -lm -ldl
